i.class: fa fa-spinner fa-spin fa-3x text-primary mb-3

div.class: card border-0 shadow-sm h-100 metric-card success
card border-0 shadow-sm h-100 metric-card info
card border-0 shadow-sm h-100 metric-card warning
card border-0 shadow-sm h-100 metric-card danger
card-header bg-warning text-dark py-2 d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center

span.class: badge bg-light text-dark rounded-pill fs-6 px-3 border
badge bg-light text-dark rounded-pill fs-6 px-3 border

badge bg-light text-dark rounded-pill fs-6 px-3 border
badge bg-light text-dark rounded-pill fs-6 px-3 border

div.class: card-header bg-danger text-white py-2 d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center

span.class: badge bg-light text-dark rounded-pill fs-6 px-3 border

div.class: card-header bg-danger text-white py-2 d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center

div.small: No hay pagos en el periodo

div.class: card-header bg-success text-white py-2 d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center

div.small: No hay cobros en el periodo

div.class: card-header bg-white border-bottom py-2 d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center flex-wrap gap-2
card-header bg-white border-bottom py-2 d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center
card-header bg-white border-bottom py-2 d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center

div.div: Proyeccion basada en el comportamiento de los ultimos 6 meses. La opacidad indica el nivel de confianza.
